title: The Princes Gather Their Resolve
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Jinbe, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the princes gather their resolve.
scene: The scene follows the princes gather their resolve, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Jinbe, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take a good look!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't doubt you are watching this broadcast from a monitor somewhere on this island ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: These are the humans who crushed the ambitions of the noble arlong pirates, who fought for the rage of our race!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ZORO!! USOP!! Brook!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What do they think they're playing at...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone knows I'd

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!! They got caught!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Remember between

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: By the time the king's execution is complete...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Glug... Glug...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this room will be flooded completely. That alone will be enough...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...to take the lives of these inferior humans, yes...?!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy!! Your head is worth four hundred million bell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: The lives of your crew will serve as a perfect example to the humans on the surface!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now!! It is time for us to start clearing out the trash of the old ryluguu kingdom!!!

dialogue.speaker: New Fish-Man Pirates
dialogue.text: In three hours' time, this country will be reborn as a new fish-man island of dignity and pride!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is terrible ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I will not allow it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it all!! The water level just keeps on rising!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can't you do something about it, zero-kun?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sure... If you get these chains off me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chains, begone!! ...It's no good. I don't have psychic powers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, but did you see their faces?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those fishmen almost jumped out of their skin when they saw me move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aahhh haha!! It moved!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: That is correct!! I am just dead Bones brook!! Yohoho!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you'd just stayed where you were and played dead, you could have helped us escape.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Somebody help me!! I'm going to be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ah!! But I'm already dead!! Yo40- hooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, Nami and Caimie escaped, right? They can just bring Luffy and the rest to get us out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And what if they don't show up?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Robin impression!! "I wonder if Nami has been eaten by Deepwater fish..."

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho!! That's just like her..!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The ocean forest

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Deep within the forest depths...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a little different from the Doneglyphs ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ....I have read before now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It is almost like a letter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: and a letter of apology, at that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who could it be apologising to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who in the world are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "Joyboy" ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you hear that?! My bounty's four hundred million!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: When did it go up?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is this really the time?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's blatantly picking a fight with us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your actions in the war sent your fame shooting sky- high...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: though once you exceed three hundred million, it's difficult to get any higher.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, if it's a fight he wants, that's what we'll give him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wait, Luffy- Kun!!

summary: The Princes Gather Their Resolve. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
